manuscript_sections: Section 6 Error Taxonomy and Negative Evidence

headline_results.public_raster_symbol: p100_precision_at_recall70 improves F1 by +0.095458 and lowers inflation by -2.525917 vs v28 on the 74-row overlay subset.
headline_results.image_only_space: space/room target-level F1 is 0.370752 with center recall 0.742448 on 61 matched rows.
headline_results.contains_relation: expected-json replay reaches 1.000000 relation F1 on primary dev and secondary smoke splits.
headline_results.negative_evidence: image-only symbol/text remain weak; P123/P124 do not pass all gates.

safe_claims: precision-oriented symbol opt-in improves target-level F1/inflation on a 74-row subset
image-only room/space branch has usable target-level signal
contains policy is validated only under expected-json replay
selector/compressor probes identify bottlenecks but are not runtime defaults
